title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Salvia sclarea, also known as sage, essential oils helps with oily hair because it has natural astringent properties that help to balance the scalp's oil production. The oil's antibacterial properties also help to control the growth of bacteria that can lead to oily hair and scalp conditions. Additionally, Salvia sclarea essential oil has antifungal properties that can help to eliminate fungal infections that may contribute to oily hair. This results in a healthier, more balanced scalp...
